ab: maitan’e zou meesi no ’untoo ’to ’oyona tmopsʉ, man’i ’o isi hioa ci yupatoosa’o to ’oyona tmopsʉ.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: mo yaa yupa e’tʉyʉ, mo’potʉ to mali, toosa’o no mayahe, ’otole, pono to yanosuyu.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: ne mi’o seolʉa no peyaofʉ, mi’o smopcuku, meoino yuhmuyu ’o ka’li.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: at’inghi mi’o yac’ʉ, mi’o a’cʉ’cʉnʉ peayofʉ.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: ne mi’ocu seolʉa no toepaezumo mo acʉhʉ na’na kokaekaebʉ.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: e’vono o’a mi’o somayahea, at’inghi mi’o na’no kokaekaebʉ, maica ho os’ocu aepʉnga na’e yupa toosa’o.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
